title: Fragment Of A Sonnet. To Harriet.
content:
Ever as now with Love and Virtue's glow
    May thy unwithering soul not cease to burn,
    Still may thine heart with those pure thoughts o'erflow
    Which force from mine such quick and warm return.
meaning:
"Fragment Of A Sonnet. To Harriet." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
